## Which skill?

- [ ] `osint-methodology`
- [ ] `offensive-osint` (router)

## Proposed section / capability

Brief description of what should be added.

## Justification

Why this matters for external red-team OSINT work. Real-world example helps.

## Proposed location

- New section in skill: __________?
- New subsection (e.g., §1.x) in skill: __________?
- Expansion to existing section (which skill and section)?

## Sketch of content

If you have a draft, paste it here. Markdown formatting preferred.

If it's a wordlist / regex catalog / probe path table, paste the raw data.

## Coverage gap (if known)

Does this address a smoke-test prompt that currently fails? Reference the test number from `tests/smoke-test-prompts.md`.

## Checklist

- [ ] This is OSINT-only (no active exploitation, post-exploit, or malware tradecraft).
- [ ] Severity / detectability / confidence tags can be assigned per the methodology rubrics.
- [ ] At least one sample prompt for self-test verification.

## Additional context

Anything else.
